personal.name: Adarsh Pradeep

experience.tech: Flutter, Backend Systems, Firestore, Event-Driven Architecture, UI/UX
achievements: Developed real-time routing, dynamic itinerary generation, and optimized backend logic improving response time by 32%.
Implemented Firestore sync pipelines and an event-driven alert system ensuring low-latency data updates.
Improved UI/UX flows leading to measurable reduction in navigation overhead and drop-off rates.

projects.title: NetSlice Attention Models
projects.description: Research/implementation repo for attention-based models (likely for network slicing/traffic intelligence).

projects.title: Slice-Aware 5G (NWDAF-style Analytics + Forecasting)
projects.tech: Python, Jupyter Notebook, Time-Series Forecasting, 5G KPIs, NWDAF
projects.description: End-to-end 5G slice traffic analytics and forecasting pipeline using PCAP-derived KPIs (eMBB, URLLC, mMTC). Builds multivariate time-series datasets and implements baseline models plus a VAR-GRU-TFT hybrid forecaster within an NWDAF-style fusion framework.

projects.title: 5G VAR-GRU-TFT Hybrid Forecaster
projects.tech: Python, Time-Series Forecasting, VAR, GRU, TFT, 5G KPIs
projects.description: End-to-end 5G slice traffic analytics and forecasting pipeline using PCAP-derived KPIs (eMBB, URLLC, mMTC). Builds multivariate time-series datasets and implements baseline models plus a VAR-GRU-TFT hybrid forecaster within an NWDAF-style fusion framework.

projects.title: Multi-Tenant Airline Operations (SkyFleet)
projects.description: Multi-tenant airline operations system with role-based workflows (admin/crew/passenger) and operational modules like flight creation, crew assignment, booking automation, and operational analytics.

projects.title: Tamil GMM-HMM Speech Transcription (Noisy)
projects.description: Tamil ASR pipeline using classic GMM-HMM (Kaldi-style) components for speech transcription in noisy conditions.

projects.title: Train Scheduling using CFG + PDA
projects.description: Train scheduling project modeled/solved using concepts from formal languages (CFG) and pushdown automata (PDA).

projects.title: Lightweight ASR Architectures
projects.description: Built a compact ASR model optimized for edge/low-compute devices, focusing on compression and faster inference using optimization techniques like quantization and pruning.

projects.title: EEG Multi-Class Neuropsychiatric Diagnosis
projects.tech: Jupyter Notebook, EEG, Classification, Biomedical ML
projects.description: Machine learning project for multi-class classification/diagnosis using EEG signals for neuropsychiatric applications.

projects.title: Laser Audio Transmission System
projects.description: A hardware project that transmits audio signals using a modulated laser beam. The system converts audio to a laser signal, transmits, and demodulates to reproduce the original audio.

projects.title: Leukemia Subtype Prediction with Deep Learning
projects.tech: Jupyter Notebook, Deep Learning, Healthcare AI
projects.description: Deep learning project for predicting leukemia subtypes (medical ML workflow implemented in notebooks).
